prophecies.q: 摩尔定律：晶体管密度每年翻倍
prophecies.a: 「集成电路上可容纳的晶体管数量大约每年翻一倍。到1975年，单个芯片上的元件数将达到65,000个。」
prophecies.q_en: Moore's Law: transistor count doubles annually
prophecies.a_en: "The number of transistors on an integrated circuit doubles approximately every year. By 1975, the number of components per chip will reach 65,000."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1975年前后，芯片上的晶体管数量确实达到了数万级别。Intel 8080处理器（1974年）包含约6,000个晶体管，而后续产品迅速增长，证实了摩尔的指数增长预测。
prophecies.verdict_en: By around 1975, transistor counts on chips indeed reached the tens of thousands. The Intel 8080 (1974) had about 6,000 transistors, with subsequent products growing rapidly, confirming Moore's exponential growth prediction.

prophecies.q: 修正版摩尔定律：翻倍周期调整为两年
prophecies.a: 「我将我之前的预测修正为：晶体管密度大约每两年翻一倍，而非每年。这个速率更为可持续。」
prophecies.q_en: Revised Moore's Law: doubling every two years
prophecies.a_en: "I am revising my earlier prediction: transistor density doubles approximately every two years, not every year. This rate is more sustainable."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 修正后的两年翻倍周期（后来业界常说18个月）被证实惊人地准确。从1975年到2020年，45年间晶体管数量从数千个增长到数百亿个（Apple M1芯片含160亿个晶体管），与两年翻倍的指数曲线高度吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: The revised two-year doubling period (often cited as 18 months by industry) proved remarkably accurate. From 1975 to 2020, transistor counts grew from thousands to tens of billions (Apple M1 has 16 billion transistors), closely matching the exponential doubling curve.

prophecies.q: 集成电子学将引发一场革命
prophecies.a: 「集成电路将导致诸如家用电脑——或至少是连接到中央计算机的终端——自动控制汽车、个人便携式通信设备等奇迹的出现。」
prophecies.q_en: Integrated electronics will spark a revolution
prophecies.a_en: "Integrated circuits will lead to such wonders as home computers — or at least terminals connected to a central computer — automatic controls for automobiles, and personal portable communications equipment."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 这三项预测全部应验。1980年代家用电脑普及（IBM PC, Apple Macintosh）；1990年代起汽车电子控制系统（ECU）成为标配；1990年代末至2000年代手机成为个人便携通信设备的主流。摩尔在1965年就精确预见了三大产品品类。
prophecies.verdict_en: All three predictions came true. Home computers became widespread in the 1980s (IBM PC, Apple Macintosh); automotive electronic control units (ECUs) became standard from the 1990s; mobile phones became mainstream personal portable communications by the late 1990s-2000s. Moore precisely foresaw three major product categories in 1965.

prophecies.q: 计算成本将指数级下降
prophecies.a: 「随着晶体管密度翻倍而成本减半，计算能力将变得极其廉价，最终每个人都能负担得起。」
prophecies.a_en: "As transistor density doubles and costs halve, computing power will become extremely cheap, eventually affordable for everyone."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 计算成本的下降幅度超出了所有人的想象。1965年每个晶体管成本约1美元，2020年已低于十亿分之一美元。智能手机（售价数百美元）的计算能力超过了1960年代占据整层楼的大型机。全球约40亿人拥有智能手机。
prophecies.verdict_en: The drop in computing costs exceeded all expectations. In 1965, each transistor cost about $1; by 2020, it was less than a billionth of a dollar. Smartphones (costing hundreds of dollars) surpassed the computing power of room-sized mainframes from the 1960s. About 4 billion people worldwide own smartphones.

prophecies.q: 芯片复杂度的增长终有物理极限
prophecies.a: 「摩尔定律不可能永远持续下去。硅材料的物理特性决定了我们最终会遇到不可逾越的障碍……我认为还能持续10到20年。」
prophecies.q_en: Chip complexity growth has physical limits
prophecies.a_en: "Moore's Law can't continue forever. The nature of silicon means we will eventually hit insurmountable barriers... I think it can continue for another 10 to 20 years."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 摩尔的自我修正被证实。2015年起Intel将制程节奏从两年延长至三年以上。经典的Dennard缩放定律在2006年前后已失效。到2025年，虽然晶体管数量仍在增长（通过3D封装、EUV光刻等新技术），但传统意义上的摩尔定律（每两年翻倍、成本减半）已显著放缓。
prophecies.verdict_en: Moore's self-correction proved accurate. From 2015, Intel extended its process cadence from two years to three or more. Classical Dennard scaling broke down around 2006. By 2025, while transistor counts still grew (via 3D packaging, EUV lithography), traditional Moore's Law (doubling every two years with halved costs) had significantly slowed.

prophecies.a: 「互联网将从根本上改变我们做生意的方式、教育系统、以及人们相互沟通的方式。它的影响将是全面的和不可逆转的。」
prophecies.a_en: "The internet will fundamentally change the way we do business, the education system, and the way people communicate with each other. Its impact will be comprehensive and irreversible."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 到2015年，互联网已彻底改变了商业（电商、云计算）、教育（在线课程、MOOC）和通信方式（社交媒体、即时通讯）。全球互联网用户超过30亿，电子商务销售额达万亿美元级别。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2015, the internet had thoroughly transformed business (e-commerce, cloud computing), education (online courses, MOOCs), and communication (social media, instant messaging). Global internet users exceeded 3 billion, with e-commerce sales reaching trillions of dollars.

prophecies.q: 手持设备将取代许多传统计算设备
prophecies.a: 「未来你口袋里的设备将拥有比今天的台式电脑更强大的计算能力。人们会随身携带自己的计算终端。」
prophecies.q_en: Handheld devices will replace many traditional computing devices
prophecies.a_en: "The device in your pocket will have more computing power than today's desktop computers. People will carry their own computing terminals with them."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2015年智能手机的处理能力已远超1998年的台式电脑。iPhone 6s（2015年）的A9处理器包含约20亿个晶体管，运算速度是1998年奔腾II处理器的数百倍。全球智能手机用户突破20亿。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2015, smartphone processing power far exceeded 1998 desktop computers. The iPhone 6s (2015) A9 chip contained about 2 billion transistors, hundreds of times faster than the 1998 Pentium II. Global smartphone users surpassed 2 billion.

prophecies.q: 汽车将实现高度电子化和自动化
prophecies.a: 「芯片将使汽车变得越来越智能。计算机辅助驾驶、防碰撞系统，甚至最终的自动驾驶汽车，都将成为现实。」
prophecies.q_en: Cars will become highly electronic and automated
prophecies.a_en: "Chips will make cars increasingly intelligent. Computer-assisted driving, collision avoidance systems, and eventually self-driving cars will become reality."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 到2025年，计算机辅助驾驶已成为主流：ADAS（高级驾驶辅助系统）是新车标配，特斯拉Autopilot、通用Super Cruise等系统广泛使用。Waymo在美国多城市运营无人驾驶出租车。现代汽车平均包含超过100个电子控制单元和数千万行代码。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2025, computer-assisted driving became mainstream: ADAS is standard in new cars, Tesla Autopilot and GM Super Cruise are widely used. Waymo operates robotaxis in multiple US cities. Modern cars average over 100 ECUs and tens of millions of lines of code.

prophecies.q: 每个芯片上的晶体管数量将达到十亿级
prophecies.a: 「按照目前的趋势，到2010年代，单个处理器芯片上的晶体管数量将达到十亿的量级。」
prophecies.q_en: Transistor count per chip will reach billions
prophecies.a_en: "At the current pace, by the 2010s, the number of transistors on a single processor chip will reach the order of billions."
prophecies.verdict_zh: Intel Haswell处理器（2013年）包含14亿个晶体管，IBM z13处理器（2015年）包含约40亿个晶体管。到2015年，十亿级晶体管已成为高端处理器的常态，完全验证了这一预测。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Intel Haswell processor (2013) contained 1.4 billion transistors; the IBM z13 (2015) had about 4 billion. By 2015, billion-scale transistor counts were standard for high-end processors, fully validating this prediction.

prophecies.q: 半导体产业将成为全球最大产业之一
prophecies.a: 「半导体将成为世界上最重要的产业之一，其规模和影响力将超过钢铁和汽车制造业。」
prophecies.q_en: Semiconductor industry will become one of the world's largest
prophecies.a_en: "Semiconductors will become one of the world's most important industries, surpassing steel and automobile manufacturing in scale and influence."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年全球半导体产业营收约4,400亿美元，2023年突破5,000亿美元。芯片被视为与石油同等重要的战略资源，各国纷纷推出芯片产业政策（美国CHIPS法案、欧盟芯片法案等）。半导体产业市值远超传统钢铁和汽车制造业。
prophecies.verdict_en: Global semiconductor revenue reached about $440 billion in 2020 and surpassed $500 billion in 2023. Chips are considered as strategically important as oil, with nations launching chip industrial policies (US CHIPS Act, EU Chips Act). The semiconductor industry's market cap far exceeds traditional steel and auto manufacturing.

prophecies.q: 新材料和新结构将延续摩尔定律精神
prophecies.a: 「即使硅基缩放放缓，工程师们也会找到新的方法——新材料、三维结构、新的计算架构——来延续性能的指数级提升。」
prophecies.q_en: New materials and structures will extend Moore's Law spirit
prophecies.a_en: "Even if silicon scaling slows, engineers will find new approaches — new materials, three-dimensional structures, new computing architectures — to continue exponential performance improvements."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 到2025年，3D FinFET晶体管（2012年起）、GAA纳米片晶体管（2022年三星3nm）、EUV极紫外光刻（2019年量产）、Chiplet小芯片封装等技术创新延续了性能提升趋势。台积电的3nm和2nm工艺持续推进，验证了摩尔关于「工程师会找到新方法」的判断。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2025, 3D FinFET transistors (from 2012), GAA nanosheet transistors (Samsung 3nm, 2022), EUV lithography (mass production 2019), and chiplet packaging innovations continued the performance improvement trend. TSMC's 3nm and 2nm processes kept advancing, validating Moore's judgment that engineers would find new approaches.

prophecies.q: 计算能力将推动人工智能的实现
prophecies.a: 「当计算能力足够强大、足够廉价时，机器将能够执行我们今天认为需要人类智慧才能完成的任务。」
prophecies.q_en: Computing power will enable artificial intelligence
prophecies.a_en: "When computing power becomes powerful enough and cheap enough, machines will be able to perform tasks that we currently believe require human intelligence."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 到2025年，GPU算力的指数级增长（NVIDIA H100/B200芯片）直接推动了大语言模型（GPT-4、Claude等）和生成式AI的突破。AI已能完成写作、编程、图像生成、医学诊断等此前被认为需要人类智慧的任务。摩尔定律驱动的算力增长是AI革命的硬件基础。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2025, exponential GPU computing growth (NVIDIA H100/B200 chips) directly enabled breakthroughs in large language models (GPT-4, Claude) and generative AI. AI can now perform writing, coding, image generation, and medical diagnosis — tasks previously thought to require human intelligence. Moore's Law-driven computing growth is the hardware foundation of the AI revolution.

prophecies.q: 芯片微型化最终将遇到原子尺度壁垒
prophecies.a: 「当晶体管的尺寸缩小到只有几个原子的宽度时，量子效应将使传统晶体管无法正常工作。届时我们需要全新的计算范式。」
prophecies.q_en: Chip miniaturization will hit atomic-scale barriers
prophecies.a_en: "When transistors shrink to just a few atoms wide, quantum effects will prevent traditional transistors from functioning properly. We will need entirely new computing paradigms."

prophecies.q: 数字技术将渗透到生活的方方面面
prophecies.a: 「廉价的计算能力和传感器将使数字技术渗透到生活的每一个角落——医疗、农业、交通、能源管理——无处不在的计算将成为常态。」
prophecies.q_en: Digital technology will permeate every aspect of life
prophecies.a_en: "Cheap computing power and sensors will enable digital technology to penetrate every corner of life — healthcare, agriculture, transportation, energy management — ubiquitous computing will become the norm."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 到2020年，物联网（IoT）设备数量超过100亿台。智能医疗设备（可穿戴血糖监测、远程心电监测）、精准农业（GPS引导、无人机喷洒）、智能交通（ETC、网约车）、智能电网等已全面普及。COVID-19疫情进一步加速了数字技术在医疗、教育、办公等领域的渗透。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2020, IoT devices exceeded 10 billion globally. Smart medical devices (wearable glucose monitors, remote ECG), precision agriculture (GPS-guided, drone spraying), smart transportation (electronic tolling, ride-sharing), and smart grids became widespread. The COVID-19 pandemic further accelerated digital penetration in healthcare, education, and remote work.
